name: page-pilot
description: A dependency-free, four-layer toolkit for visualized browser automation: page-pilot (playback with an animated cursor, click ripples, and highlight borders), page-pilot-recorder (turn real clicks/typing into a step array), page-pilot-skills (turn a recording into a reusable, named skill), and a bookmarklet toolkit tying them together with no install required.

scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:recorder && npm run test:real-datepicker && npm run test:skills && npm run test:toolkit
